title: Global keyword search from top nav
creator: unknown

comments.author: unknown
comments.text:
Feature: Global issue search

Scenario: Search from the top navigation bar
  Given I am viewing the issue list
  And the Initiatives, Epics, and Issues type filters are set to specific values
  When I enter a search keyword or phrase in the top navigation bar
  Then the search runs across all issues regardless of type
  And the type filters are temporarily disabled
  And the results list shows all matching issues
  When I clear or close the search
  Then the previous type filter settings are restored
